sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_enum (CounterID UInt32, GoalsReached Array(Int32));
SELECT count() AS Reaches, countIf(num = 2) AS Hits FROM test_array_enum ARRAY JOIN GoalsReached, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) AS num WHERE CounterID = 160656;
UPDATE test_array_enum SET GoalsReached = arrayConcat(GoalsReached, [6, 7]) WHERE CounterID = 160656;
SELECT CounterID, arrayEnumerate(GoalsReached) FROM test_array_enum WHERE CounterID = 160656;
